commands.review_summary:
The PR changes WhatsApp Web auth handling so passive terminal disconnects preserve credentials while explicit login, QR relink, reconnect, and logout paths own stale-auth cleanup or marker clearing.

PR surface: Source +87, Tests +620. Total +707 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and v2026.6.6 delete WhatsApp Web auth during passive terminal logged-out/conflict stop handling, while the PR preserves files and moves cleanup to explicit recovery flows. I did not run a live WhatsApp unlink, QR scan, or conflict-session scenario.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the missing test harness argument, but maintainers still need to accept the session-state behavior before merge.
